name: kafka-consumer
description: Consumes messages from Apache Kafka topics. Supports SASL/SSL authentication, consumer groups, and Avro/JSON deserialization.
author: hermes-core

bootstrap_servers.title: Bootstrap Servers
bootstrap_servers.description: Comma-separated list of Kafka broker addresses (e.g. broker1:9092,broker2:9092)

group_id.title: Consumer Group ID
group_id.description: Kafka consumer group identifier for offset tracking

poll_timeout_ms.title: Poll Timeout (ms)
poll_timeout_ms.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for messages per poll

max_poll_records.title: Max Poll Records
max_poll_records.description: Maximum number of records returned in a single poll call

session_timeout_ms.title: Session Timeout (ms)
session_timeout_ms.description: Consumer group session timeout in milliseconds

retry_backoff_ms.title: Retry Backoff (ms)
retry_backoff_ms.description: Backoff duration in milliseconds before retrying a failed request

topics.title: Topics
topics.description: Comma-separated list of topic names to subscribe to

topic_pattern.title: Topic Pattern
topic_pattern.description: Regex pattern to subscribe to matching topics (overrides topics if set)

auto_offset_reset.title: Auto Offset Reset
auto_offset_reset.description: Where to start consuming when no committed offset exists

enable_auto_commit.title: Enable Auto Commit
enable_auto_commit.description: Automatically commit consumer offsets after processing

dedup_key_field.title: Deduplication Key Field
dedup_key_field.description: Field name within the message value used for deduplication (leave empty to disable)

filter_expression.title: Filter Expression
filter_expression.description: JSONPath or JMESPath expression to filter incoming messages (leave empty to accept all)
